Aerospace Case

Low-Volume Satellite Equipment Mounting Plate Machining

satellite equipment mounting / hole-position accuracy / batch traceability

IndustriesAerospace
Part Functionsatellite equipment mounting / hole-position accuracy / batch traceability
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC plate machining, flatness control, precision holes, CMM inspection and FAI records

Project Scenario

The mounting plate project focused on small-batch delivery for satellite equipment where hole-position accuracy and traceable inspection data were required.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The delivery package documented critical dimensions and batch references for customer-side assembly verification.
